SkyWidget

Documentation Module

The Stage

A compact telemetry surface with D3 rendering, floating controls, and atmospheric glass intended for dense monitoring interfaces.

Live Telemetry

84.2%

+2.4% vs last orbit

import { SkyWidget } from '@sky-ui/react-sky';

export function Example() {
return <SkyWidget title="Atmospheric Pressure" data={[10, 25, 45, 30]} />;
}
